title: Add Ubuntu/Debian install instructions
body: We now have packages for them in kubic so we can add it as installation instruction as well.

comments.body:
LGTM
But the README.md is becoming rather long.  I wonder if we should consider moving everything under "Obtaining skopeo" to an install.md and add a link to that to the README.md....
Yes lets consolidate that under install.md and not in the readme.

> Yes lets consolidate that under install.md and not in the readme.

Done :+1:
LGTM, a couple of questions that could be addressed later.
hmm, GitHub ate a comment.  I asked if we should bump the golang min from 1.9 to 1.12.12 due to the CVE issues ine earlier variants of go.  Your call.

> hmm, GitHub ate a comment. I asked if we should bump the golang min from 1.9 to 1.12.12 due to the CVE issues ine earlier variants of go. Your call.

Fixed as well :+1:

LGTM
and thanks a bunch @saschagrunert for your usual attention to detail!
